title: ANN Reviews Evangelion 20
wikitext:
[]: ANN Reviews Evangelion 2.0 [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by EvaCub » Tue Nov 24, 2009 12:53 am The Review I personally got more excited to see this in better quality than before!

[]: Re: ANN Reviews Evangelion 2.0             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Nov 24, 2009 1:11 am EvaCub wrote: The Review I personally got more excited to see this in better quality than before!

[]: Re: ANN Reviews Evangelion 2.0             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Nov 24, 2009 1:22 am Electric Sachiel wrote: Mari fights using Eva Unit 05 in a Nerv base in Israel? Wow.....thats a beefy bit.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Nov 24, 2009 1:41 am Episode 20 ("Don't Rape My Mind!")? Not only is 20 not that kind of tone (22 IS, however), but no episode is named that... Grr. Otherwise nice, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Tue Nov 24, 2009 9:27 am each battle in 2.0 feels like a desperate fight to the death, and destroying each angel comes dangerously close to being a zero-sum game

[]: Re: ANN Reviews Evangelion 2.0 [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:09 am EvaCub wrote: The Review I personally got more excited to see this in better quality than before!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:44 am Legendary: They were quoting an episode line (not a title) and thought it was from 20 instead of 22. Xard: Asuka tried to cook for Shinji too. >_> And Rei did it so Gendo & Shinj could get along. Anyway, awesome news! I had a feeling the Rebuild hate was over-blown. Good to know the sensible anime-watching types (Like Ornette) do like Rebuild so far.

[]: Re: ANN Reviews Evangelion 2.0 [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Nov 24, 2009 1:42 pm Xard wrote: Shinji (made) bento for his entire new extended family (even Rei).

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Tue Nov 24, 2009 5:43 pm I liked the reivew, it was at least far more in-depth then the variety review.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Nov 25, 2009 8:48 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Xard: Asuka tried to cook for Shinji too. >_> And Rei did it so Gendo & Shinj could get along.
